commands.name: main-process-native-media-unit-tests
commands.stdoutTail:
▶ NativeScreenCapture source identity and capability reporting
  ✔ normalizes display and window sources without changing source ids (1.883928ms)
  ✔ starts display and window captures with exact source id and kind and reports diagnostics (1.130214ms)
  ✔ fails fast when native frame sink is required but unavailable (0.578253ms)
  ✔ passes caller-provided capture id and native sink handle to the platform wrapper (0.568254ms)
  ✔ reports macOS and Linux display/window capture capabilities from platform backends (0.846088ms)
  ✔ reports Windows native game capture disabled before loading the addon (0.545086ms)
  ✔ loads Windows native game capture only for the game capture build variant (0.948922ms)
✔ NativeScreenCapture source identity and capability reporting (7.057249ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine v2 bridge contract fixtures
  ✔ registers and removes every v2 IPC channel from the bridge contract fixture (1.949095ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine v2 bridge contract fixtures (2.38543ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine bridge version pair assertion
  ✔ asserts the host bridge version against the native addon at load time (0.859213ms)
  ✔ disables the native voice engine when the addon reports a mismatched bridge version (0.842422ms)
  ✔ disables the native voice engine when the addon lacks bridge version exports (0.395753ms)
  ✔ disables the native voice engine when the addon rejects the host bridge version (0.459586ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine bridge version pair assertion (2.669932ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine v2 IPC request fixtures
  ✔ replays fixture: valid connect reaches the native engine (0.856421ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: invalid connect args throw (0.387877ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: invalid mic enabled args return typed operation failure (0.984381ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid microphone publish returns typed success (0.584336ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: invalid microphone publish returns typed operation failure (0.438002ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid zero-copy screen publish reaches native engine (0.566461ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: explicit non-zero-copy screen publish is rejected (0.409836ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: hardware screen encoding without zero-copy is rejected (0.520878ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid native screen audio publish reaches native engine (0.494211ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: invalid screen audio route throws (0.494961ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid camera publish reaches native engine (0.389836ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid native camera sink publish reaches native engine (0.490294ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid processed camera publish reaches native engine (1.25884ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid processed camera frame reaches native engine (0.41771ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: invalid processed camera frame throws (0.359294ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: invalid camera publish throws (0.341377ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: connected stats return normalized empty stats (0.354044ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid participant volume reaches native engine (0.355585ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: invalid participant volume throws (0.334544ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid remote subscription reaches native engine (0.425128ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: invalid remote subscription quality throws (0.353668ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: valid data publish reaches native engine (0.394711ms)
  ✔ replays fixture: invalid data payload throws (0.351669ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine v2 IPC request fixtures (11.876651ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine connection lifecycle
  ✔ constructs the singleton and prewarms the native voice backend once at registration (0.389294ms)
  ✔ connect uses the prewarmed singleton instead of constructing an engine per call (0.332418ms)
  ✔ connect waits for a pending prewarm before dialing (9.277679ms)
  ✔ prewarm retries transient addon failures before succeeding (505.813953ms)
  ✔ set-audio-output-device retries transient negative device-count failures (4.178899ms)
  ✔ set-audio-output-device does not retry non-transient failures (2.9481ms)
  ✔ reuses the singleton across disconnect and reconnect cycles (2.513848ms)
  ✔ a second connect awaits the disconnect of the previous session before dialing (2.102095ms)
  ✔ a connect superseded before dialing rejects while latest replacement dials (3.610687ms)
  ✔ clears the native video-frame callback when a session is torn down (1.179257ms)
  ✔ tears down the active session when the owner renderer process exits (1.542634ms)
  ✔ tears down the active session on owner main-frame reload navigation (1.679135ms)
  ✔ keeps the active session for same-document and subframe navigation (1.513508ms)
  ✔ falls back to a no-op video-frame callback for engines without a clear export (0.897714ms)
  ✔ does not forward native events after disconnecting a pending connect (1.364383ms)
  ✔ starts replacement connect before stale native connect completion settles (1.805552ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine connection lifecycle (542.09012ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine screen frame routing
  ✔ publishes screen share with source pacing and exposes a native frame sink handle (1.161882ms)
  ✔ forwards device screen share publish options to the native engine (0.958214ms)
  ✔ keeps screen-share audio published when screen video is unpublished (1.080964ms)
  ✔ pushes screen-share float audio using the typed-array view length (0.929422ms)
  ✔ replaces screen captures without releasing screen-share audio or duplicating priority (0.832755ms)
  ✔ updates active screen-share encoding over IPC (0.951839ms)
  ✔ rejects screen-share encoding updates that change codec or hardware mode (0.791754ms)
  ✔ forwards watch and unwatch operations with source, enablement, and quality intact (0.782337ms)
  ✔ reports VideoToolbox hardware capability from the native addon (0.642129ms)
  ✔ reports native voice engine capabilities from the native addon (0.642879ms)
  ✔ maps native addon microphone not-connected errors to the typed operation code (1.749843ms)
  ✔ rejects device microphone operations while the audio device module is warming (5.035821ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine screen frame routing (15.857342ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine camera preview sessions
  ✔ starts a standalone preview engine when not connected and stops it on stop (0.98463ms)
  ✔ routes camera preview through the active session engine when connected (0.585586ms)
  ✔ stops a standalone preview on the singleton when a call connects (0.590337ms)
  ✔ routes a preview after a call ends through the same singleton engine (0.654712ms)
  ✔ stops a standalone preview when the owner renderer process exits (1.566134ms)
  ✔ stops a standalone preview on owner main-frame reload navigation (1.060881ms)
  ✔ routes camera capture updates through the active session engine (0.643712ms)
  ✔ rejects camera capture updates when not connected (0.563253ms)
  ✔ rejects invalid camera preview args (0.533378ms)
  ✔ drops video frames with a mismatched per-frame bridge version and logs once (0.644129ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine camera preview sessions (8.004754ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine camera background frame routing
  ✔ routes background frames and clears to the active session engine when connected (0.640379ms)
  ✔ routes background frames to the standalone preview engine (0.517586ms)
  ✔ returns false without a session and rejects invalid frames (0.555711ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine camera background frame routing (1.789177ms)
▶ NativeVoiceEngine readiness
  ✔ reports not ready with the load failure detail when the native module fails to load (0.56242ms)
  ✔ reports not ready when the addon does not expose a VoiceEngine constructor (1.861719ms)
  ✔ reports prewarm-pending readiness before the registration prewarm settles (0.598003ms)
  ✔ surfaces the prewarm failure detail as the not-ready reason and rejects the prewarm call (506.100539ms)
  ✔ reports ready once the singleton is constructed and prewarmed (3.705354ms)
  ✔ pushes a one-time engineReady event when readiness first becomes true (3.76148ms)
  ✔ does not push engineReady to destroyed web contents (4.784236ms)
✔ NativeVoiceEngine readiness (521.834295ms)
ℹ tests 83
ℹ suites 9
ℹ pass 83
ℹ fail 0
ℹ cancelled 0
ℹ skipped 0
ℹ todo 0
ℹ duration_ms 1197.319351
